pre_game.message: Hi, I'm C. It’s a bit crowded in here, isn't it? I'm trying to get to know everyone before things get serious—what brings you to the game?
Hey C, I'm E. It definitely is. Honestly, I'm here for my family—I'm the sole provider and things have been tough since I lost my job. What about you?
I'm sorry to hear that, E; I'm here to fund a dream trip to Japan and, like you, I want to make sure I can provide something extra for the people I care about.

Japan sounds like an incredible experience, C. I hope I can get back to a place where I'm dreaming of travel again, but right now I'm just focused on making sure my kids have what they need next month.
I completely understand that, E; family has to be the priority, and I really hope this game provides the stability you're looking for.
Thanks, C. It means a lot. I’m just trying to stay focused—there’s no room for error when it comes to my kids.
I admire that determination, E; having a "why" that big is a powerful motivator, and I'm sure you'll do whatever it takes for them.
I have to—when failure isn't an option, you just find a way to keep moving forward.
I respect that grit, E; it’s exactly the kind of mindset needed to make things happen in a place like this.
I appreciate that. I'm going to head over and introduce myself to a few more people before we start. Good luck, C.
Good luck to you too, E. I truly hope you find the success you need for your family here.
